summary: Created CONTINUE card for Chroma (Flash, balanced tier) image model integration. One card, 3 phases like MPI-4: generation (in progress), upscaler (later), detailer (later). Created directly in doing — user authoring the generation workflow now.

Locked full dependency picture from workflow. Uploads (2): Chroma1-HD-Flash.safetensors + t5xxl_fp16.safetensors. Reuse: ae.safetensors (already on R2). New custom node: RES4LYF (model-specific -> node_lock.json + Chroma dependencies[], NO installOnEngine, installRequirements true). Op t2i single-stage. API export already in repo at comfy_workflows/Chroma_t2i.json. Settings: Chroma LoRA = model-strength ONLY, hide clip strength. Upscaler/detailer = SDXL-style + RES4LYF delta. Following add-model-playbook.

RES4LYF pinned (ClownsharkBatwing/RES4LYF @419de2d7, git-commit, installRequirements true, NO installOnEngine) in node_lock.json + dependencies.js. Added 2 weight deps: t5xxl-fp16 (sha 6e480b09..., uploading) + chroma1-hd-flash (sha pending, uploading). Reuse: ae.safetensors + 4x-NMKD-Siax (both already on R2/registered). Upscaler workflow = UltimateSDUpscale + RES4LYF + NMKD-Siax; Chroma_Upscaler.json landed in comfy_workflows/. NEXT: patch chroma sha when hash done, then models.js model def + LoRA-no-clip flag.

All 3 workflows landed + inspected: Chroma_t2i (1-step gen), Chroma_upscaler (UltimateSDUpscale+RES4LYF+NMKD-Siax), Chroma_detailer (MaskDetailerPipe/Impact+RES4LYF). User facts: ALL LoRAs in all 3 = NO clip (model-wide flag, not per-wf); t2i is 1 step; upscaler+detailer steps behave like SDXL. Both chroma shas patched into dependencies.js. Upload bwlimit corrected to 3M (was mistakenly 1M then 1M-wrong-direction). Chroma dependencies[] final: chroma1-hd-flash + t5xxl-fp16 + ae + 4x-NMKD-Siax + RES4LYF (Ultimate/Impact/Mpi are universal, already installOnEngine). NEXT: models.js def.

models.js: added chroma-flash model def (type chroma, balanced tier, ops t2i/upscale/detail, loraStrengths:[model], workflows Chroma_t2i/upscaler/detailer.json, 7 deps all resolve). LoRA-no-clip = existing model.loraStrengths seam (no component change; MpiLoraModel node has no clip input anyway). ratios.js: registered chroma -> orientation mode + FLUX_RATIOS (Flux-family). resolveWorkflowFile passes through verbatim (no variant/stage2/engine split for image). Type-consumer sweep done: only real branch was ratios.js; crop/resize _family is a user-picked ratio radio, not model.type. End-to-end node resolve verified. REMAINING: real Chroma preview image (currently sdxl-real-01.webp placeholder); uploads still running @3M; live gen test once weights land.

RES4LYF auto-install WORKED (log): download GitHub archive -> extract -> rename RES4LYF-<commit> to RES4LYF -> requirements installed -> object_info reseeded, NO restart. BUT unpinned requirements.txt + --upgrade caused SILENT DEP DRIFT across whole engine: opencv-python 4.13.0->5.0.0 (MAJOR) + numpy 2.5.0->2.5.1. Same class as LTX/kornia trap. Env still imports+works (both opencv variants now 5.0.0, cv2 functional). Leftover ~umpy temp dirs (harmless). DECISION: hold pipPins pin until live gen confirms opencv 5 works end-to-end, THEN pin to proven-good versions (premature pin risks locking bad ver). OPEN UI BUG: install progress hit 101% + Verifying stage never showed in new Model Library UI (Preparing correctly skipped since most deps on disk).

Fixed 2 UI bugs in new Model Library (MpiModelManager, MPI-215 rewrite dropped both): (1) 101% overshoot - _tileState pct now Math.min(...,100) on BOTH live-job + partial paths (job.progress can exceed 1.0 on mixed on-disk+download install). (2) Missing Verifying stage - _tileState now renders indeterminate Verifying sweep when st.job.phase===verifying (phase IS emitted by downloadManager 329/1129 + in tile refresh sig 979, just never rendered by lean tile). Added .mpi-tile__prog--indeterminate sweep keyframes to CSS. eslint clean. Preparing correctly absent (deps on disk). STILL OPEN: opencv/numpy pin decision held pending live gen confirm.

CORRECTION: the 101%/Verifying UI fix was mis-logged here; it is NOT Chroma work -> moved to new card MPI-218. Chroma gen root cause = TYPO in Chroma_t2i.json node 1647 title Ouptput_Image (should be Output_Image); harvester matches exact output_image so typo->no output captured (gen itself ran fine, 51s). USER fixes at source in ComfyUI + re-exports (live-workflow rule: agent must NOT edit workflow files). My test-edit REVERTED. Upscaler+detailer titles correct (Output_image). Also documented the typo->silent-no-output trap in .claude/rules/comfy_injection.md (Output_Image row).
note: open: user re-export Chroma_t2i with fixed title, then re-test gen

summary: User re-exported Chroma_t2i.json with fixed capture title (Output_Image, verified matches harvester). Ready for gen re-test. This gen also confirms opencv5/numpy2.5.1 work end-to-end -> if it produces output, pin opencv/numpy in RES4LYF dep.

Chroma t2i LIVE-VERIFIED: output captured, cards render, RES4LYF loads, opencv5/numpy2.5.1 confirmed working end-to-end (VRAM ~14.7GB). User confirmed working. Phase 1 (generation) DONE. Testing upscale+detail next.

Pinned RES4LYF unpinned deps (opencv-python==5.0.0.93, numpy==2.5.1) via pipPins to stop the shared-env drift MPI-217 hit (opencv 4->5 major). proven-good = the live-verified gen. Parses clean. Same guard pattern as LTXVideo kornia pin.

ALL 3 workflows live-verified local (t2i+upscale+detail). SCOPE LOCKED: exactly 3 workflows, NO controlnet/other (Chroma limited), NO high tier - user tested full model: bad LoRA adherence + very slow, rejected. Balanced/Flash is the ONLY tier -> the variants/tier axis is moot for Chroma. Local integration COMPLETE. REMAINING: (1) R2 uploads finish (t5xxl 76%, chroma pending, ETA ~2hr @3MiB/s); (2) verify fresh R2 download; (3) Pod/remote-engine test once R2 has weights (RunPod = the remote code path, not local).

LoRA gen 400 during Chroma test = NOT a Chroma bug -> split to MPI-219 (extra-folders never reloads ComfyUI paths). Chroma LoRA wiring itself is correct (loraStrengths:[model], no-clip injection safely skipped per comfyController L1101, proven by LTX/Wan). Chroma LoRA test will pass once MPI-219 fixed OR after an engine restart (yaml re-read at boot).

R2 UPLOADS DONE + verified. Both files three-way match (local==R2==public HEAD 200): Chroma1-HD-Flash 17800038288 bytes, t5xxl_fp16 9787841024 bytes. Publicly downloadable at models.cubric.studio/vision/models/{diffusion_models,text_encoders}/. dependencies.js URLs + shas already registered. REMAINING: (1) fresh-download verify on clean models dir; (2) Pod/remote verify (needs Pod rebuild to bake new R2 weights + RES4LYF via node_lock). Local integration fully done.
